*.note: Wildcard ('*') grants unrestricted control across all services. Effectively a master key — affects every ATT&CK tactic.

iam:*.note: Full IAM permissions enable arbitrary identity manipulation, persistence, and audit-evasion.

sts:*.note: Full STS access enables unrestricted role assumption — any cross-account or cross-role pivot.

sts:assumerole.note: Assume another role to acquire elevated permissions or pivot across boundaries.

sts:assumerolewithsaml.note: SAML-federated role assumption can bypass standard auth and ride external identity provider.

sts:assumerolewithwebidentity.note: OIDC-federated assumption — risky if trust policy is loose (e.g. wildcard sub claim).

sts:getfederationtoken.note: Issue a federation token — a fresh credential bundle that may bypass MFA.

sts:getsessiontoken.note: Obtain temporary session credentials independent of long-lived keys.

iam:passrole.note: Pass role to a service (Lambda, EC2, ECS) to inherit that role's permissions — classic privilege pivot.

iam:attachuserpolicy.note: Attach managed policy to user — direct escalation vector.

iam:detachuserpolicy.note: Detach security/audit policy to weaken posture or evade SCP enforcement.

iam:putuserpolicy.note: Inline policy injection on user — durable escalation, not surfaced in managed-policy lists.

iam:deleteuserpolicy.note: Remove inline policy to evade controls or wipe forensic trail.

iam:attachrolepolicy.note: Attach policy to role — escalates anyone who can assume the role.

iam:detachrolepolicy.note: Detach security/audit policy from role to weaken controls.

iam:putrolepolicy.note: Inline role policy injection — escalate without managed-policy paper trail.

iam:deleterolepolicy.note: Remove inline role policy to evade controls.

iam:attachgrouppolicy.note: Attach policy to group — escalates all group members.

iam:addusertogroup.note: Add user to privileged group for inherited rights.

iam:removeuserfromgroup.note: Pull user from audit group to evade tracking.

iam:createaccesskey.note: Mint new access key — long-lived backdoor credential, persists across MFA reset.

iam:deleteaccesskey.note: Delete used access key to remove evidence of misuse.

iam:listaccesskeys.note: Enumerate access keys — pre-cursor to credential extraction.

iam:createloginprofile.note: Add console login to a programmatic-only user — establishes interactive foothold.

iam:updateloginprofile.note: Reset another user's password — account takeover.

iam:deleteloginprofile.note: Remove console login to clean up after access.

iam:updateassumerolepolicy.note: Modify trust policy to permit attacker principal — silent backdoor on existing role.

iam:createpolicyversion.note: Publish a permissive new policy version. Pairs with iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion.

iam:setdefaultpolicyversion.note: Switch default policy version to a permissive one.

iam:createrole.note: Stand up new role with attacker-controlled trust policy.

iam:createuser.note: Provision new IAM user as backdoor.

iam:deleteuser.note: Delete user to remove forensic trail or sabotage account.

iam:deleterole.note: Delete role to remove evidence or break workloads.

iam:deletepolicy.note: Delete policy — remove guardrails or break dependent workloads.

iam:getuserpolicy.note: Read inline policy attached to user.

iam:getrolepolicy.note: Read inline policy attached to role — identify trust gaps.

iam:listattachedrolepolicies.note: Map managed policies attached to roles.

iam:listattacheduserpolicies.note: Map managed policies attached to users.

iam:simulateprincipalpolicy.note: Probe effective permissions without performing the action — recon goldmine.

iam:getaccountauthorizationdetails.note: Full snapshot of every IAM principal in the account.

secretsmanager:getsecretvalue.note: Read plaintext secret from Secrets Manager.

ssm:getparameter.note: Read SSM parameter (often holds credentials when SecureString without IAM gating).

kms:decrypt.note: Decrypt secrets/tokens encrypted under a KMS key.

lambda:updatefunctioncode.note: Modify Lambda code — execute as the function's IAM role.

lambda:createfunction.note: Create Lambda — pairs with iam:PassRole for privilege pivot.

ec2:runinstances.note: Spawn instance with privileged IAM profile (requires iam:PassRole).

ssm:sendcommand.note: Run arbitrary commands on managed instances.

cloudtrail:stoplogging.note: Halt audit logging — wipe blue team's eyes.
